prompt:
A precision module kit for a high-end trophy laid out in an organized exploded arrangement, including a crest shell, electronics tray, cable channels, planter ring, engraved spine tabs, and several multi-material printed components ready for assembly. The parts should look engineered to fit together, with crisp edges, alignment tabs, and mixed finishes that suggest a premium build process. A few fasteners and assembly tools nearby reinforce that this is a modular fabrication set rather than a completed object.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a clean near-future maker-aesthetic: soft cinematic bench lighting, realistic plastic and metal textures, no logos, no readable text, and no identifiable faces. The arrangement should be orderly and icon-friendly, centered on the kit pieces so the image reads instantly as a complex assembly package for DSPACE.
